    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model with parameters of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    Tribe.addCard(Player player, Card card)
    Adds a card to the tribe, delegating to the card's own placement logic (which routes it to the characters or the buildings).
    abstract void
    Card.addToTribe(Player player, Tribe tribe)
    Adds this card to the given tribe; each subtype routes itself to the right collection and applies its on-add side effects.
    void
    Card.payPickCost(Player player)
    Commit phase: pay food cost on the real player.
    void
    Game.pickBonusCard(Player player, Card bonusCard)
    Resolves the end-of-round bonus pick by delegating to the current state.
    default void
    GameState.pickBonusCard(Game game, Player player, Card bonusCard)
    Resolves the optional end-of-round bonus pick.
    void
    Game.pickCards(Player player, List<Card> selectedCards)
    Resolves a player's card pick by delegating to the current state.
    default void
    GameState.pickCards(Game game, Player player, List<Card> selectedCards)
    Resolves a player's card pick for the offer tile their totem sits on.
    void
    Game.placeTotemOnOffer(Player player, OfferTile tile)
    Places a player's totem on an offer tile by delegating to the current state.
    default void
    GameState.placeTotemOnOffer(Game game, Player player, OfferTile tile)
    Places the given player's totem on an offer tile.
    void
    Game.setActivePlayer(Player activePlayer)
    Sets the active player and notifies observers.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Player
    EndGameState.determineWinner(Game game)
    Finds the winner by highest Player.finalPP(), breaking ties by food.
    Methods in it.polimi.ingsw.am22.model.states with parameters of type Player
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    BonusCardSelectionState.pickBonusCard(Game game, Player player, Card bonusCard)
    Resolves the bonus pick: validate the chosen card, charge its cost and add it to the player's tribe, then continue with event resolution.
    void
    ActionResolutionState.pickCards(Game game, Player player, List<Card> selectedCards)
    Resolves the active player's action for the tile their totem occupies.
    void
    TotemPlacementState.placeTotemOnOffer(Game game, Player player, OfferTile tile)
    Places the player's totem on the chosen tile, then either passes the turn to the next player or, if everyone has placed, starts the action phase.
